notes: TC-1 and TC-2 were remediated by updating server/convex/db/users.test.ts to call the exported public query definition via getCurrentUser.handler(...) with mocked ctx.auth.getUserIdentity().
Authenticated path now asserts identity lookup and users index query execution; unauthenticated path asserts null return and zero users query calls.

Canonical function location in this repository is server/convex/db/*.ts: db.users.getCurrentUser is implemented in server/convex/db/users.ts and db.sessionMessages.list is implemented in server/convex/db/sessionMessages.ts. This matches the existing generated API namespace and established module pattern; moving to server/convex/users/* or server/convex/sessionMessages/* would change module layout without improving canonical function IDs.

Requested path convex/_generated/ai/guidelines.md was not present in this worktree; implementation followed existing Convex patterns in server/convex/db/ and generated server wrappers used by current tests.
